instruction: Hannah is stenciling a border on a wall. She plans to repeat picture a tulib, a daisy, a rose, and a lily in that order, as shown below tulip, daisy, rose, lily, tulip, daisy, rose, lily,... The first flower Hannah stencils is a tulip. What will be the 30th flower she stencils? [ANS] A. rose  B. tulip  C. daisy  D. lily
